creator: ari@ish.com.au
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/kernelconfig-config.html states that:

> KLD modules cannot be loaded into a PAE enabled kernel, due to the differences in the build framework of a module and the kernel.

This is not correct. See:

http://article.gmane.org/gmane.os.freebsd.current/101853/
